Finding the root of Minimum Height Trees is like finding the topological center of the graph.
Think about removing leaves layer by layer. The last remaining nodes (there can be at most 2) are the roots of the MHTs.
Build an adjacency list and keep an array of degrees for each node.
Push all leaf nodes (degree == 1) into a queue. Remove them, updating the degree of their neighbors, and push new leaves into the queue. Repeat until n <= 2.
